name: Sue's Simple Low Fat Quiche
recipeIngredient: Filling - tuna, pineapple, onions, broccoli, spinach, corn, etc (whatever takes your fancy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a quiche dish with non-stick baking spray.
3. Place fillings in the dish and sprinkle cheese over.
4. In a bowl, combine 150 ml milk, 2 eggs (1 egg + 1 egg white), 30 ml flour (white/low-carb flour such as corn or potato flour), a pinch of mixed herbs, and black pepper to taste. Beat well to remove any lumps.
5. Pour the custard mixture over the fillings.
6. Bake in the oven for approximately 35 minutes until set.
The above quantities are sufficient for a standard quiche dish (approximately 25 cm in diameter). For larger dishes, double the ingredients and use a rectangular casserole dish.
